issue_title: fix(data-table): fix pseudo checkbox in data-table. (closes #525)
issue_body_preview:
the css was incorrect for the pseudo checkbox in this release because it was changed in material, we need to remove the top and left overrides from it

https://github.com/Teradata/covalent/issues/525

#### Test Steps

- [x] `ng serve`
- [x] Go to http://localhost:4200/#/components/data-table
test_description_zh: 打开数据表格组件演示页面，观察数据表格中行选择复选框的显示位置和样式是否正确，包括对齐和视觉呈现。
expected_result_zh: 数据表格中的伪复选框（pseudo checkbox）应正确定位显示，无顶部或左侧偏移异常，复选框在行中正确对齐，视觉样式与 Material Design 规范一致。
